availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: There are two versions of the Angelus in Romanized Lushootseed.

app.rdg: The Angelus:
THE ANGELUS.
THE ANGELUS.
The Angelus
Gwalh Sherhk Siam To chussand, twal Maly to essemtomsh.
V. Gwalh kwi Sherk-Siam tu schiss^ad dhual Mari tu yetsobtub.
V. g ∑…ô…¨ k ∑i sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab tuscŐĆ…ôsad dx ∑ Ēal Mari tuy…ôc…ôbtub.
V. g ∑…ô…¨ k ∑i sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab tuscŐĆ…ôsad dx ∑ Ēal Mari tuy…ôc…ôbtubsŐĆ.
The angel sent from God said to Mary.
Oi gulo to shŇćbńēls k si Maly gwal St. Esprit tussińĀyŇ≠s.
R. Hoi gwa ta shubelts kusi Mari gwalh Sent-Ospli tu siayus.
R. huy g ∑…ô tusŐĆub…ôlc k ∑si Mari g ∑…ô…¨ Sent-Ospli tusyayus.
huy g ∑…ôl tusŐĆub…ôls k ∑si Mari g ∑…ô…¨ Sent-Ospli tusyayus.
And then Mary (conceived??) of the Holy Spirit.
O tsi siam etc.
O Tsisiam Mari, &c.
O tsi si Ēab Mari &c.
O tsi si Ēab Mari etc.
Hail Mary etc.
Dea ched tsa, gwalh Sherk Siam stŇćdek.
V. Diya ched tsa gwalh Sherk-Siam stodakr.
V. di Ēa Ē cŐĆ…ôd Ē…ôca g ∑…ô…¨ sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab stud…ôq.
di Ēa Ē cŐĆ…ôd Ē…ôca g ∑…ô…¨ sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab stud…ôq.
Here am I the handmaiden of the Lord.
Klob ched ŇŹŇćyińď atadsgwa adsŇćgwadgwad!
R. 'Tlob ched tlo hoyil asista ata adsgwa adsogwadgwad.
R. ∆õ'ub cŐĆ…ôx ∑ …¨uhuyil Ē…ôs Ēist…ô Ē Ē…ô t(i) adsg ∑a Ē adsug ∑adg ∑ad.
∆õ'ub cŐĆ…ôx ∑ ∆õ'uhuyil Ē…ôs Ēist…ô Ē Ē…ô t(i) adsg ∑a Ē adsug ∑adg ∑ad.
May you do as you have said.
O Tsisiam Mari, etc.
O Tsisiam Mari, 'c.
Ēu tsi si Ēab Mari 'c.
O tsi si Ēab Mari etc.
Hail Mary etc.
Tu Ňć«ź Asbiatz kwi gwalh sherkh-siam Beda.
V. Tu hoyil absbiats kwi Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam.
V. tuhuyil Ēabsbiats k ∑i b…ôda Ē Ē…ô k ∑i sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab.
tuhuy Ē…ôsbiats k ∑i g ∑…ô…¨ sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab b…ôda Ē
V. The Son of God was made flesh.
Gulo ulohr Dńďbalh kwe tosńĀńÉs.
R. Gula alahu debalh kwi tus as.
R. g ∑…ôl Ēal…ôx ∑ dib…ô…¨ k ∑i tus Ēa Ēs.
g ∑…ôl Ēal…ôx ∑ dib…ô…¨ k ∑i tus Ēa Ēs.
R. and among us was his existence.
O Tsisiam, etc.
O Tsisiam, etc.
Ēu tsi si Ēab Mari 'c.
O tsi si Ēab Mari 'c.
Hail Mary etc.
St. Mali skoy ak Sherk-Siam Ňćtńēńďchorh twal Sherk Siam twal Debalh!
V. Sent-Mari skoi aku Sherk-Siam otehechchahu dhual di Sherk-Siam dhual debalh.
V. Sent-Mari sk ľ ∑uy Ē…ô k ∑i sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab Ēut'iwi…¨ cŐĆ…ôx ∑ dx ∑ Ēal di sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab dx ∑ Ēal dib…ô…¨.
Sent-Mari sk ľ ∑uy Ē…ô k ∑i sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab Ēut'iwi…¨ cŐĆ…ôx ∑ dx ∑ Ēal di sŐĆ…ôq si Ēab dx ∑ Ēal dib…ô…¨.
Saint Mary mother of God pray unto God for us.
Dilh tldahu hoyils tsoku kwi tlus kŇ≠dńĀchelh gwal J.C. aldńĀkham.
R. Dilh tldahu hoyils tsoku kwi tlus kudadchelh gwalh Shesu-Kri tus aldakrab.
R. di…¨ …¨…ôdx ∑huyils c…ôk ľ ∑ k ∑i …¨usk ∑…ôdadcŐĆ…ô…¨ g ∑…ô…¨ Shesu-Kri Ēaldaq…ôd.
di…¨ …¨udx ∑huyils c…ôk ľ ∑ k ∑i …¨usk ∑…ôdadcŐĆ…ô…¨ g ∑…ô…¨ Shesu-Kri Ēaldaq…ôb.
in order to make correct our receiving of the promises from Jesus Christ.
